'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 34''' was the thirty-fourth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[August 21]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|The Battle of Yavin]]
*[[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Troops]]
*[[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] - [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|Shield Generator]]
*[[DRK-1 Dark Eye probe droid/Legends|Sith Probe Droid]]
*[[Scan grid|Scan Grid]]
*[[Air taxi/Legends|Coruscant Air Taxi]]
